The PR changes `tryMatchModel` to sort alias and dated-version model candidates with numeric-aware `localeCompare` and adds a focused `parseModelPattern` regression test while preserving existing fallback tests.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +11. Total +11 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows `parseModelPattern("opus", [claude-opus-4-9, claude-opus-4-10])` reaches the current plain lexicographic comparator and would select the older `4-9`.

target.title: fix: use numeric sort for model alias resolution
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes alias model resolution for version-like model ids that cross into double-digit minor versions.

Previously, `tryMatchModel` sorted candidate model ids with plain lexicographic `localeCompare`, so ids like `claude-opus-4-9` could sort above `claude-opus-4-10`. This caused partial aliases such as `opus` to resolve to an older model.

This PR updates model candidate sorting to use numeric-aware collation and adds a regression test for the `4-9` vs `4-10` case.

Fixes #96588.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/sessions/model-resolver.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/sessions/model-resolver.ts src/agents/sessions/model-resolver.test.ts`
target.author: mralonsocorona
